attractions.name: Val d'Orcia
attractions.description: A UNESCO World Heritage valley famed for its rolling hills, cypress-lined roads, vineyards, and Renaissance towns
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

attractions.name: Chapel of Vitaleta
attractions.description: Iconic chapel that is a postcard-perfect image of Tuscany
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

attractions.name: San Quirico d'Orcia
attractions.description: A charming medieval hill town in Val d'Orcia, known for its historic walls, Romanesque churches, and Renaissance gardens
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
